{"society_power": 5.5, "state_power": 7.0, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "1830 July Revolution absorbed by elite July Monarchy", "reasoning": "Society asserted itself in the Trois Glorieuses and grew via press, industry, and labor mobilization, but the outcome channeled power to propertied notables while the 1834-35 repressive laws, Lyon/Paris suppressions, and expanded education/military capacity reinforced the state\u2014leaving society roughly flat and the state modestly stronger."}
